ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 (ScarCruft) RokRAT / CHINOTTO C2 to legitimate cloud-storage APIs (pCloud, Yandex, Dropbox, Box)
ucs.description: Hunts non-browser, non-sync-client processes beaconing to pCloud / Yandex Disk / Dropbox / Box REST endpoints — the signature C2/exfil channel for ScarCruft's RokRAT, CHINOTTO and DOGCALL implants, which use cloud-storage APIs to blend with normal HTTPS rather than dedicated infrastructure.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(All_Traffic.dest_ip) as dest_ip values(All_Traffic.dest_url) as dest_url from datamodel=Network_Traffic.All_Traffic where (All_Traffic.dest IN ("api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","binapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","cloud-api.yandex.com","content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","api.box.com","upload.box.com") OR All_Traffic.dest_url IN ("*api.pcloud.com*","*cloud-api.yandex.net*","*content.dropboxapi.com*","*api.box.com*")) AND NOT (All_Traffic.process_name IN ("chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","iexplore.exe","Dropbox.exe","DropboxUpdate.exe","Yandex.Disk.exe","YandexDisk.exe","pCloud.exe","Box.exe","BoxSync.exe","BoxDrive.exe","OneDrive.exe","outlook.exe","thunderbird.exe")) by host All_Traffic.src All_Traffic.user All_Traffic.process_name All_Traffic.process_path All_Traffic.dest | `drop_dm_object_name(All_Traffic)` | where match(process_path, "(?i)\\\\(AppData|Temp|Public|ProgramData|Users\\\\Public)\\\\") OR match(process_name, "(?i)^(powershell|pwsh|mshta|rundll32|regsvr32|wscript|cscript|cmd)\\.exe$")
ucs.kql:
// APT37 (ScarCruft) RokRAT / CHINOTTO cloud-API C2
let _cloud_c2_hosts = dynamic(["api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","binapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","cloud-api.yandex.com","content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","api.box.com","upload.box.com"]);
let _legit_clients = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","iexplore.exe","Dropbox.exe","DropboxUpdate.exe","Yandex.Disk.exe","YandexDisk.exe","pCloud.exe","Box.exe","BoxSync.exe","BoxDrive.exe","OneDrive.exe","outlook.exe","thunderbird.exe"]);
let _lolbins = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","cmd.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","curl.exe"]);
DeviceNetworkEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where RemoteIPType == "Public"
| where RemoteUrl has_any (_cloud_c2_hosts)
| where InitiatingProcessFileName !in~ (_legit_clients)
| where InitiatingProcessAccountName !endswith "$"
| where InitiatingProcessFolderPath has_any (@"\AppData\", @"\Temp\", @"\Public\", @"\ProgramData\", @"\Users\Public\")
    or InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_lolbins)
| summarize ConnCount = count(),
            FirstSeen = min(Timestamp),
            LastSeen  = max(Timestamp),
            DistinctMinutes = dcount(bin(Timestamp, 1m)),
            SampleUrl = any(RemoteUrl),
            SampleCmd = any(InitiatingProcessCommandLine)
            by DeviceName, InitiatingProcessAccountName, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessFolderPath, InitiatingProcessSHA256, RemoteIP
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// APT37 (ScarCruft) RokRAT / CHINOTTO cloud-API C2 — Sentinel ASIM
let _cloud_c2_hosts = dynamic(["api.pcloud.com","eapi.pcloud.com","binapi.pcloud.com","cloud-api.yandex.net","cloud-api.yandex.com","content.dropboxapi.com","api.dropboxapi.com","api.box.com","upload.box.com"]);
let _legit_clients = dynamic(["chrome.exe","msedge.exe","firefox.exe","brave.exe","iexplore.exe","Dropbox.exe","DropboxUpdate.exe","Yandex.Disk.exe","YandexDisk.exe","pCloud.exe","Box.exe","BoxSync.exe","BoxDrive.exe","OneDrive.exe","outlook.exe","thunderbird.exe"]);
let _lolbins = dynamic(["powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","mshta.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","cmd.exe","certutil.exe","bitsadmin.exe","curl.exe"]);
ImNetworkSession
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where DstHostname has_any (_cloud_c2_hosts) or Url has_any (_cloud_c2_hosts)
| extend ProcessName = tolower(ActingProcessName)
| where ProcessName !in~ (_legit_clients)
| where ActorUsername !endswith "$"
| where ActingProcessCommandLine has_any (@"\AppData\", @"\Temp\", @"\Public\", @"\ProgramData\")
    or ProcessName in~ (_lolbins)
| summarize ConnCount = count(),
            FirstSeen = min(TimeGenerated),
            LastSeen  = max(TimeGenerated),
            DistinctMinutes = dcount(bin(TimeGenerated, 1m)),
            SampleUrl = any(Url),
            SampleCmd = any(ActingProcessCommandLine)
            by DvcHostname, ActorUsername, ActingProcessName, DstIpAddr
| order by FirstSeen desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT37 ScarCruft RokRAT / CHINOTTO Cloud-Storage C2 Beacon
id: 4f3b8c2e-7a1d-4b9c-9d8e-c1a37f0d2b51
status: experimental
description: Detects non-browser/non-sync-client processes (especially LOLBins or binaries running from AppData/Temp) connecting to pCloud, Yandex Disk, Dropbox or Box REST API endpoints — the signature C2/exfil channel of ScarCruft's RokRAT and CHINOTTO families.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0067/
  - https://blog.talosintelligence.com/rokrat-malware/
author: detection-engineering
date: 2026/05/07
tags:
  - attack.command_and_control
  - attack.t1102.002
  - attack.t1071.001
  - attack.g0067
logsource:
  category: network_connection
  product: windows
detection:
  c2_hosts:
    DestinationHostname|contains:
      - 'api.pcloud.com'
      - 'eapi.pcloud.com'
      - 'cloud-api.yandex.net'
      - 'content.dropboxapi.com'
      - 'api.dropboxapi.com'
      - 'api.box.com'
      - 'upload.box.com'
  legit_clients:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\chrome.exe'
      - '\msedge.exe'
      - '\firefox.exe'
      - '\Dropbox.exe'
      - '\Yandex.Disk.exe'
      - '\pCloud.exe'
      - '\Box.exe'
      - '\BoxDrive.exe'
      - '\OneDrive.exe'
      - '\outlook.exe'
  suspicious_path_or_lolbin:
    - Image|contains:
        - '\AppData\'
        - '\Temp\'
        - '\Public\'
        - '\ProgramData\'
    - Image|endswith:
        - '\powershell.exe'
        - '\pwsh.exe'
        - '\mshta.exe'
        - '\rundll32.exe'
        - '\regsvr32.exe'
        - '\wscript.exe'
        - '\cscript.exe'
        - '\certutil.exe'
        - '\bitsadmin.exe'
        - '\curl.exe'
  condition: c2_hosts and suspicious_path_or_lolbin and not legit_clients
falsepositives:
  - Custom backup or sync utilities written in-house that talk to cloud storage REST APIs
  - Developer / admin scripts pushing artefacts to a cloud bucket
level: high
ucs.rationale: ScarCruft (Reaper / G0067) has uniquely standardised on legitimate cloud-storage REST APIs as its C2 channel since the 2017-2018 KARAE/RokRAT campaigns and continues with CHINOTTO and the 2023 RokRAT variants reported by Talos and AhnLab. pCloud and Yandex are particularly diagnostic — almost no other sophisticated actor relies on these two providers as a primary C2. Restricting the destination se

_sentinel_field_issues.message: `ActingProcessName` is not a column of ImNetworkSession; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.
`ActorUsername` is not a column of ImNetworkSession; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImAuthentication, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.
`ActingProcessCommandLine` is not a column of ImNetworkSession; it does exist on ImProcessCreate, ImFileEvent, ImRegistryEvent.

ucs.title: [LLM] APT37 (ScarCruft) LNK-lure spearphish chain — Explorer-spawned mshta / PowerShell pulling RokRAT stage from cloud storage
ucs.description: Hunts the characteristic ScarCruft delivery chain where a user double-clicks a .lnk masquerading as a Korean-language document (HWP/PDF/XLSX) inside a recently-extracted archive, and Explorer spawns mshta.exe or powershell.exe whose command line embeds a pCloud / Dropbox / OneDrive / Yandex URL fetching the RokRAT loader.
ucs.splunk: | tstats summariesonly=true count min(_time) as firstTime max(_time) as lastTime values(Processes.process) as cmdline values(Processes.parent_process) as parent_cmdline values(Processes.process_path) as process_path from datamodel=Endpoint.Processes where Processes.parent_process_name IN ("explorer.exe","7zFM.exe","WINRAR.EXE","Bandizip.exe","OUTLOOK.EXE") AND Processes.process_name IN ("mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe") AND (Processes.process IN ("*pcloud*","*yandex*","*dropbox*","*api.box.com*","*onedrive.live*","*1drv.ms*","*mediafire*") OR Processes.process IN ("*FromBase64String*","*DownloadString*","*Invoke-Expression*","*IEX *","*-EncodedCommand*","*hxxp*")) AND NOT (Processes.user IN ("SYSTEM","LOCAL SERVICE","NETWORK SERVICE")) by host Processes.user Processes.parent_process_name Processes.process_name Processes.process_path Processes.process | `drop_dm_object_name(Processes)` | rename _time as firstTime
ucs.kql:
// APT37 (ScarCruft) LNK -> mshta/PowerShell loader pulling RokRAT stage from cloud storage
let _archive_or_mail_parents = dynamic(["explorer.exe","7zFM.exe","7zG.exe","WinRAR.exe","Bandizip.exe","outlook.exe","thunderbird.exe"]);
let _suspect_children = dynamic(["mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe"]);
let _cloud_loader_hosts = dynamic(["pcloud","yandex","dropbox","box.com","onedrive.live","1drv.ms","mediafire"]);
DeviceProcessEvents
| where Timestamp > ago(7d)
| where AccountName !endswith "$"
| where InitiatingProcessFileName in~ (_archive_or_mail_parents)
| where FileName in~ (_suspect_children)
| where ProcessCommandLine has_any (_cloud_loader_hosts)
    or ProcessCommandLine has_any ("FromBase64String","DownloadString","Invoke-Expression","-EncodedCommand","-enc ","-w hidden","-WindowStyle Hidden","hxxp","GzipStream","Reflection.Assembly")
    or ProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)https?://[a-z0-9\.\-]+/[A-Za-z0-9_\-\.]{6,}\.(hta|jse?|vbs|ps1|dat|bin|jpg|png|gif)"
| extend KoreanLureHint = iif(InitiatingProcessCommandLine matches regex @"(?i)\.(hwp|hwpx|pdf|xlsx?|docx?)\.lnk", "yes", "")
| project Timestamp, DeviceName, AccountName,
          ParentImage = InitiatingProcessFileName,
          ParentCmd   = InitiatingProcessCommandLine,
          ChildImage  = FileName,
          ChildCmd    = ProcessCommandLine,
          KoreanLureHint, SHA256
| order by Timestamp desc
ucs.sentinel_kql:
// APT37 (ScarCruft) LNK -> mshta/PowerShell loader chain — Sentinel SecurityEvent (4688)
let _archive_or_mail_parents = dynamic(["explorer.exe","7zFM.exe","7zG.exe","WinRAR.exe","Bandizip.exe","outlook.exe","thunderbird.exe"]);
let _suspect_children = dynamic(["mshta.exe","powershell.exe","pwsh.exe","cmd.exe","wscript.exe","cscript.exe","rundll32.exe","regsvr32.exe"]);
let _cloud_loader_hosts = dynamic(["pcloud","yandex","dropbox","box.com","onedrive.live","1drv.ms","mediafire"]);
SecurityEvent
| where TimeGenerated > ago(7d)
| where EventID == 4688
| where AccountType == "User" and Account !endswith "$"
| extend ParentLeaf = tolower(tostring(split(ParentProcessName, "\\")[-1])),
         ChildLeaf  = tolower(tostring(split(NewProcessName,    "\\")[-1]))
| where ParentLeaf in (_archive_or_mail_parents)
| where ChildLeaf  in (_suspect_children)
| where CommandLine has_any (_cloud_loader_hosts)
    or CommandLine has_any ("FromBase64String","DownloadString","Invoke-Expression","-EncodedCommand","-enc ","-w hidden","-WindowStyle Hidden","hxxp","GzipStream","Reflection.Assembly")
    or CommandLine matches regex @"(?i)https?://[a-z0-9\.\-]+/[A-Za-z0-9_\-\.]{6,}\.(hta|jse?|vbs|ps1|dat|bin|jpg|png|gif)"
| project TimeGenerated, Computer, Account,
          ParentProcessName, NewProcessName, CommandLine, TokenElevationType
| order by TimeGenerated desc
ucs.sigma_yaml:
title: APT37 ScarCruft LNK Lure Chain - Explorer Spawns mshta/PowerShell with Cloud-Storage URL
id: 8c2f5d91-6b3e-4a7f-b2c8-9d4a37e1f0c2
status: experimental
description: Detects ScarCruft's signature spearphishing delivery chain - a .lnk file masquerading as a Korean-language HWP/PDF/Office document is opened from Explorer or an archive utility, spawning mshta.exe or powershell.exe whose command line embeds a pCloud / Yandex / Dropbox / OneDrive URL or PowerShell download cradle for the RokRAT loader.
references:
  - https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G0067/
  - https://www.welivesecurity.com/2023/05/02/scarcruft-asylum-rokrat/
  - https://blog.talosintelligence.com/rokrat-malware/
author: detection-engineering
date: 2026/05/07
tags:
  - attack.execution
  - attack.defense_evasion
  - attack.t1204.002
  - attack.t1059.001
  - attack.t1218.005
  - attack.g0067
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  parent_archive_or_mail:
    ParentImage|endswith:
      - '\explorer.exe'
      - '\7zFM.exe'
      - '\7zG.exe'
      - '\WinRAR.exe'
      - '\Bandizip.exe'
      - '\outlook.exe'
      - '\thunderbird.exe'
  suspect_child:
    Image|endswith:
      - '\mshta.exe'
      - '\powershell.exe'
      - '\pwsh.exe'
      - '\cmd.exe'
      - '\wscript.exe'
      - '\cscript.exe'
      - '\rundll32.exe'
      - '\regsvr32.exe'
  cloud_or_cradle:
    - CommandLine|contains:
        - 'pcloud'
        - 'yandex'
        - 'dropbox'
        - 'box.com'
        - 'onedrive.live'
        - '1drv.ms'
        - 'mediafire'
    - CommandLine|contains:
        - 'FromBase64String'
        - 'DownloadString'
        - 'Invoke-Expression'
        - '-EncodedCommand'
        - 'IEX '
        - '-WindowStyle Hidden'
        - 'Reflection.Assembly'
  condition: parent_archive_or_mail and suspect_child and cloud_or_cradle
falsepositives:
  - IT-deployed scripts that legitimately fetch payloads from corporate OneDrive
  - Developers running PowerShell one-liners from an extracted archive
level: high
ucs.rationale: ScarCruft's 2022-2024 campaigns (ESET 'Asylum Ambuscade'-adjacent reporting, AhnLab ASEC, Cisco Talos) consistently use double-extension LNKs delivered inside ZIP/RAR archives — frequently with Korean-language HWP / PDF lures targeting defectors, journalists and academics. The LNK invokes mshta or PowerShell that pulls the next-stage RokRAT loader from pCloud, Yandex Disk or OneDrive. The combinat

_field_issues.message: `KoreanLureHint` is not a canonical column of DeviceProcessEvents.
